title: Lupulus hillii
intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant "Lupulus hillii." However, I found information about the plant "Lupulus" which is another name for the Hop plant (Humulus lupulus).

Here's a paragraph about the Hop plant:

The Hop plant (Humulus lupulus) is a perennial climbing plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North America. The health benefits of the Hop plant include reducing anxiety and insomnia, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The bioactive constituents of the Hop plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, particularly humulone and lupulone, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with the Hop plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to make sedative and anti-inflammatory remedies.
